info.hindI_arTa: AjYA karanA SAsana karanA maNgala karma karanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: mANgalye sakarmakaH  devaSlokaH seDatO drazwavyaH  UdittvAdiqvikalpaH  SAstram = SAsanam  mANgalyam= maNgalArTakriyA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'na cAsmE SrutivipratizidDamucCizwaM dadyAt' (Apa0 Da0 145) vipratizidDaM nizidDam
'kravyAdBya iva BUtAnAmadAnteByaH sadA Bayam tezAM vipratizeDArTaM rAjA sfzwaH svayamBuvA' (BA0 ).. vipratizeDArTaM niyamanAya niyantraRAya
'vipratipUrvAt siDeH karmavyatihAre GaY anyonyapratizeDo vipratizeDaH' (sarasvatI0 12119) nigadavyAKyAtamidaM SrIBojasya vacanam
'tatpramARe vA na sarvapramARavipratizeDaH' (nyA0 sU0 2114) viSezeRa pratizeDo vipratizeDaH vItyayamupasargaH sampratipattyarTe na vyAGAte iti nyAyaBAzyam
